query: 把 switch 当轮 decision 延迟再往下压，而不是再扩测试面。

transcript.content: 因为现在主矛盾已经变了，不是“有没有证据证明方向对”，而是“这个方向的代价能不能接受”。 具体说有三点：
这轮修复后，最明显的新问题不是答案错，也不是完全不降，而是：• 采样窗口一放大• guarded/runtime 成本就明显上升• stress 场景跑得很慢 ==》什么原因？

主要有 4 个原因。 1. `maxTurns` 修正后，shadow 输入直接变大了。 在 [dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/dialogue-working-set-runtime-shadow.js:88) 里，原来实际上只取最近 `12` 条消息；修正后变成最近 `12`…
可以，继续一口气长任务把刚才你说的做完；
你觉得已经做完了，就给一个测试报告；
**测试报告** 这轮我把 OpenClaw 的 GC 当成“宿主端真实 prompt 控制”来测，不再只看 shadow telemetry。 结论是：**已经明显比修复前更好，但还不建议宣称“最终完全达标”**。
codex 中的 每轮context中写的Context(估算) 可以去掉了
**OpenClaw GC 测试报告** **结论** - 这轮已经把“切题后几乎不回落”的主问题修掉了。 - 修复后，真实发给 LLM 的 prompt 在关键 case 上出现了**明确回落**，而不是只“止涨”。 - 但我不建议现在就宣布“最终完全达标”，因为放大采样窗口后，runtime 成本明显上升，性能还需要继续压。
我先 review 了测试脚本，结论是：**脚本口径基本没问题，问题主要在实现**。 原因有两个： - `maxTurns` 原来按“消息条数”算，长会话的大头经常根本没进 decision 视野。 - guarded 每轮都跑 shadow/decision，很多明显“继续同一话题”的轮次也在付完整成本，但最后并不会 apply。
codex 中的 每轮context中写的Context(估算) 可以去掉了
已经去掉了。现在 `npm run codex:vscode:gc:header --silent` 默认空输出，所以 Codex 每轮不会再自动写 `Context(估算)`。 我保留了手动观测入口： - `npm run codex:vscode:gc:footer --silent` - `npm run codex:vscode:gc:size --silent` - `npm run…
把 switch 当轮 decision 延迟再往下压，而不是再扩测试面。

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains the GC/runtime optimization track: the main issue shifted from correctness to acceptable cost, especially that widening the sampling window raises guarded/runtime cost and slows stress cases. Prior context explains this as maxTurns now pulling a much larger shadow input and guarded/decision running every turn even for obvious same-topic continues, so the current direction is to push down cost by delaying same-turn switch decisions rather than broadening test coverage. A separate UI preference was resolved: the user asked to remove the per-turn `Context(估算)` header in Codex, and it was removed; keep that as a durable preference pin, not as raw prompt context.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn stays on the same active optimization task, so this is `continue`. Raw context still needed next turn is the diagnosis and testing thread around runtime cost and switch/decision behavior (t1-t6, t8-t9). The `Context(估算)` removal request is resolved and off-topic relative to the current engineering decision, so its raw turns can leave the prompt. The user preference itself is durable, so preserve it as a semantic pin.

Prior context explains this as maxTurns now pulling a much larger shadow input and guarded/decision running every turn even for obvious same-topic continues, so the current direction is to push down cost by delaying same-turn switch decisions rather than broadening test coverage. A separate UI preference was resolved: the user asked to remove the per-turn `Context(估算)` header in Codex, and it was removed; keep that as a durable preference pin, not as raw prompt context.

The user preference itself is durable, so preserve it as a semantic pin.
